requirements.task_name: Add four highest-rated 205/55 R16 winter tyres under $120 each to the cart
requirements.task_description: Find winter tyres in size 205/55 R16, filter to prices under $120 per tyre and ratings of 4+ stars, sort by rating, and add the highest-rated option as a quantity of 4 to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Book a wheel alignment on the 15th of next month between 10:00–12:00 at the nearest branch to ZIP 10001
requirements.task_description: Schedule a wheel alignment service by finding the nearest branch to ZIP code 10001, selecting the date as the 15th day of next month, and choosing a time slot between 10:00–12:00.

requirements.task_name: Buy two mid-range all-season 225/45 R17 tyres with free fitting under $150 each
requirements.task_description: Find all-season tyres in size 225/45 R17 from mid-range brands that include free fitting, limit the price to $150 or less per tyre, and add a quantity of 2 to the cart with fitting selected.

requirements.task_name: Book a full service and inspection for a 2018 Toyota Corolla within the next 14 days at the closest center to ZIP 94105
requirements.task_description: Set up a full service + inspection package for a 2018 Toyota Corolla (petrol) by selecting the nearest center to ZIP 94105 and choosing the earliest available 09:00–11:00 slot within the next 14 days.

requirements.task_name: Add two cheapest performance summer 195/50 R15 tyres with speed rating W+ and rating 4.5+ to the cart
requirements.task_description: Search for performance summer tyres in size 195/50 R15 with a speed rating of W or higher and a customer rating of at least 4.5 stars, sort by price, and add a pair of the cheapest option to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Book a mobile oil change for ZIP 30301 next Friday morning and apply promo code SAVE20
requirements.task_description: Schedule a mobile oil change service at a home address in ZIP code 30301 for next Friday in a time slot starting before 11:00, and apply the promo code SAVE20 before confirming the appointment.

requirements.task_name: Compare 225/40 R18 summer tyres and add the option with noise ≤70 dB, fuel rating A/B, and price under $140 (4 tyres)
requirements.task_description: Search for 225/40 R18 summer tyres, compare multiple options, and from the comparison choose a tyre that has a noise level of 70 dB or lower, a fuel efficiency rating of A or B, and a price under $140, then add 4 of that tyre to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Book a Saturday afternoon fitting appointment for the tyres in your cart near ZIP 60601
requirements.task_description: Starting from the cart with tyres already added, schedule a fitting appointment at a branch near ZIP code 60601 that is open on Saturdays, selecting a Saturday time slot between 13:00–15:00.
